summary: Good audience‑tape with an excellent Man Smart → Eyes segue and a fun The Other One
review: The recording is an above‑average audience tape that captures the show well enough for download. Highlights include a stellar performance of “Man Smart (Heartless Boy)” flowing smoothly into “Eyes of the World,” and a playful, intentionally distorted stretch on “The Other One.” Overall the musical showing is solid and the tape quality is respectable.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review praising both performance (standout songs, good flow) and recording (above‑average audience tape).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Above‑average audience tape; intentional space‑y distortions noted on The Other One but overall clear enough for enjoyment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Cool segue from Man Smart into Eyes of the World noted as a highlight.
